data.title: Google plans to protect against quantum computers by 2029. Bitcoin faces a shorter timeline for encryption.
data.description: Google recently announced that it has set a deadline of 2029 to encrypt its systems in preparation for quantum computers. This move aims to ensure the security of its platforms against potential threats posed by quantum technology. In contrast, Bitcoin may not have the luxury of as much time to enhance its security measures. This highlights the urgency for the cryptocurrency to address any vulnerabilities sooner rather than later. Given the rapid advancements in quantum computing, it is crucial for Bitcoin to prioritize its security efforts to safeguard against potential risks.
A smart sanitation robot is making waves on Boao’s beaches in China's Hainan. The zero-emission, low-energy cleaner is set to be a new pathway for the country for digital urban governance.

data.title: US lawmakers discuss concerns about tokenized securities in hearing, industry execs emphasize the need to apply existing regulations to protect investors.
data.description: During a recent congressional hearing, industry leaders emphasized the necessity of subjecting tokenized securities to current financial regulations to safeguard investors and uphold financial surveillance standards. They stressed the importance of maintaining consistent oversight and protection for tokenized assets.

data.title: Pulsenna Introduces AI-Powered Digital Market Intelligence and Education Platform
data.description: On March 25, 2026, in New York, a surge in the demand for tools assisting in pinpointing crucial information is observed amidst the fast-paced information cycles and continuous data influx shaping the markets. Pulsenna, an AI-driven market intelligence platform, has thus garnered attention for addressing this need effectively.

data.title: In HelloNation, Real Estate Expert Mike Heraty of Pagosa Springs Discusses Key Factors in Choosing a Ranch Property
data.description: In Pagosa Springs, Colorado, on March 25, 2026, an article from HelloNation delves into the key factors that determine a successful ranch acquisition, going beyond just the dimensions and beauty of the property. The piece examines the importance of land productivity, practicality, and sustainable utility in the long run. It features insights from a Real Estate Expert, aiming to provide a comprehensive outlook on what makes a ranch investment truly fruitful.

data.title: Atossa Therapeutics Reports Fourth Quarter and Year-End 2025 Financial Results and Provides a Corporate Update
data.description: Today, Atossa Therapeutics, a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ATOS, revealed its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2026 in Seattle. Atossa focuses on creating innovative treatments for oncology and other critical medical areas.

data.title: Rising Ether staking and exchange outflows suggest supply squeeze. Will ETH price react accordingly?
data.description: The amount of Ether being staked is steadily increasing, accompanied by a rise in ETH leaving exchanges. This trend prompts speculation on whether it will influence the price of ETH positively or negatively.

data.title: Greenidge Generation Announces Amendments to and Preliminary Results of Exchange Offer
data.description: In Pittsford, New York, Greenidge Generation Holdings Inc. (Nasdaq: GREE) disclosed an amendment to its offer to exchange the 8.50% Senior Notes due 2026 (traded as "GREEL" on Nasdaq) with more favorable terms. Greenidge is a power generation company focusing on datacenters and infrastructure development. This amendment impacts the terms of the previously announced Exchange Offer for its outstanding Old Notes.

data.title: Dundee Corporation Delivers Strong 2025 Results; Advances Mining Strategy Through Monetizations and Capital Repositioning
data.description: In Toronto on March 25, 2026, Jonathan Goodman, the President and CEO of Dundee Corporation, announced that the company achieved robust net earnings for the year. This growth was propelled by substantial investment gains in their mining portfolio and notable monetization transactions. These activities bolstered Dundee's cash reserves at the end of the year, enhancing their financial flexibility. Goodman highlighted that the company now possesses a sturdy balance sheet and significant liquidity. This puts Dundee in a favorable position to reinvest capital in initiatives aimed at maximizing returns and ensuring long-term value for shareholders.

data.title: KBRA Assigns Preliminary Ratings to CROSS 2026-NQM4 Mortgage Trust
data.description: KBRA has issued preliminary ratings for ten classes of mortgage pass-through certificates from the CROSS 2026-NQM4 Mortgage Trust RMBS transaction. This $519.8 million issuance under the CROSS shelf involves Hildene-CCC Loan Acquisition II, LLC and CrossCountry Capital as co-sponsors. The certificates are backed by 904 residential mortgages, with 78.3% categorized as "non-prime."
JBS 4Q ADJ. EBITDA $1.72B, EST. $1.6B

data.title: In HelloNation, Residential Real Estate Expert Amy McLemore Discusses AI Tools in Real Estate
data.description: In Jackson, Tennessee on March 25, 2026, a PRNewswire article delves into the role of AI in real estate, addressing how it aids realtors without supplanting the crucial human judgment that clients rely on. The article highlights insights from Realtor Amy McLemore of Jackson, TN, discussing the ways in which AI supports the real estate industry. This feature elaborates on the integration of AI technology to enhance efficiency and decision-making processes for real estate professionals like McLemore, showcasing the benefits of leveraging AI tools while acknowledging the continued importance of human expertise in the field.

data.title: Oklo Co-Founder and CEO Appointed to Serve on President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology
data.description: In a recent announcement, Oklo Inc. (NYSE: OKLO), an advanced nuclear technology company, revealed that its CEO and co-founder, Jacob DeWitte, has been selected by U.S. President Donald J. Trump to join the President’s Council of Advisors on Science and Technology (PCAST). DeWitte will be collaborating with prominent figures from the fields of science, engineering, and industry. The company was established by DeWitte and Chief Operating Officer Caroline DeWitte over a decade ago.

data.title: CrowdStrike and IBM Expand Strategic Collaboration to Accelerate Agentic SOC Transformation
data.description: A strategic collaboration between CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) and IBM has been expanded to bolster SOC transformation efforts. The partnership, announced in RSA 2026, will incorporate CrowdStrike's Charlotte AI™ with IBM's Autonomous Threat Operations Machine (ATOM), an autonomous SOC orchestration engine. This integration aims to facilitate rapid investigation and containment at machine speed. Additionally, the collaboration will see the extension of CrowdStrike's Falcon® platform into IBM Consul.

data.title: Nordea Bank Abp: Repurchase of own shares on 25.03.2026
data.description: On March 25, 2026, Nordea Bank Abp in Helsinki, Finland, announced changes in its own shares at 22:30 EET. The bank (LEI: 529900ODI3047E2LIV03) disclosed the completion of repurchases of its own shares (ISIN: FI4000297767) on the same day. The specific details of the repurchases, including quantities and prices, were not provided in the news.

data.title: Consequences of abnormal seismic activity at the Garpenberg mine
data.description: In Garpenberg, the recent surge in seismic activity has subsided, leading to plans to resume mining operations at reduced capacities in the second quarter of 2026. Initial production figures for the first quarter indicate a throughput of approximately 0.8 million tons, falling short of the projected slightly over 0.9 million tons.

data.title: Settlement Reached in Foroughi obo Laurel School v. Laurel School PTO, et al.
data.description: Today, Jaclyn Foroughi of Laurel School Parent Teacher Organization (PTO) announced significant reforms and the settlement of the case Foroughi obo Laurel School v. Laurel School PTO, et al. in San Mateo County Superior Court (Case No. 21CIV01197). The settlement marks a milestone for the organization, with key changes being implemented moving forward. This development comes after a period of legal proceedings in San Mateo, California.

data.title: Oceaneering Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Oceaneering has set the dates for its first quarter 2026 earnings release and conference call as April 22 and April 23, respectively.
Enerpac Tool Group Reports Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Results
